name: Font.FontStyle
summary: Vertical angle of font Upright, Italic, or Oblique

enum_values.name: Italic
enum_values.summary: The face is sloped so the top is to the right of the base. Face names sometimes use the word "oblique" for italic faces.

enum_values.name: Oblique
enum_values.summary: The face is sloped so the top is to the left of the base. This is extremely rare. NOTE WELL: Face names sometimes use the word "oblique" for italic faces.
